whoItsFor: Startups launching their first digital product
Agencies needing a dependable development partner

useCases.title: Corporate Websites
useCases.description: Brand-focused marketing sites with CMS, lead capture, and analytics integrated for measurable growth.

useCases.title: Customer Portals
useCases.description: Secure self-service portals for account management, orders, support tickets, and document access.

useCases.title: Internal Dashboards
useCases.description: Role-based web applications that give teams real-time visibility into operations and KPIs.

useCases.title: B2B Platforms
useCases.description: Dealer, vendor, or partner portals with tiered access, catalogue browsing, and workflow automation.

web-development.whyChoose: WJB Technologies combines modern frontend engineering with practical delivery for Indian businesses. We build web platforms that load fast on mobile networks, integrate with tools you already use, and remain maintainable as your team and requirements grow.
deliverables: Admin panel and CMS where applicable
additionalContent: Every web project at WJB Technologies begins with clarity on user journeys, conversion goals, and technical constraints. We document assumptions early, validate designs through prototypes when needed, and keep stakeholders informed with sprint demos. This approach reduces surprises at launch and helps your internal team adopt the platform confidently.

Whether you need a marketing site, a customer portal, or a data-heavy business application, our developers follow consistent coding standards, version control practices, and security guidelines. We also plan for growth—modular architecture, caching strategies, and database design that supports increasing users and data without costly rewrites.

whoItsFor: Businesses reaching customers on iOS and Android
Field teams needing mobile workflow tools
Enterprises extending ERP or CRM to mobile

useCases.title: Consumer Apps
useCases.description: Engaging mobile experiences for onboarding, browsing, transactions, and loyalty programmes.

useCases.title: Field Service Apps
useCases.description: Offline-capable apps for technicians with GPS routing, photo capture, and job completion workflows.

useCases.title: Sales Force Apps
useCases.description: Mobile CRM tools for lead tracking, visit logging, and order placement in the field.

useCases.title: On-Demand Services
useCases.description: Real-time booking, tracking, and notification-driven apps for service marketplaces.

mobile-app-development.whyChoose: We build mobile apps that perform reliably on mid-range Android devices common in India, handle intermittent connectivity gracefully, and align with platform design expectations on both iOS and Android.
additionalContent: Mobile users expect speed, clarity, and reliability. Our team designs navigation and screen flows that reduce friction, implements efficient API communication, and tests on representative devices before release. We also plan update cycles so your app stays compatible with new OS versions and store policies.

From MVP launches to enterprise mobility programmes, WJB Technologies supports phased rollouts—core features first, then iterative enhancements based on real usage data. Admin dashboards often accompany mobile projects so your operations team can manage content, users, and notifications without developer dependency.

useCases.title: Line-of-Business Apps
useCases.description: Departmental tools for inventory, production tracking, billing, and reporting on Windows desktops.

useCases.title: Peripheral Integration
useCases.description: Applications connecting to scanners, printers, weighing scales, and industrial equipment.

useCases.title: Data Entry Systems
useCases.description: High-volume keyboard-driven interfaces optimised for accuracy and speed.

useCases.title: Reporting Suites
useCases.description: Desktop tools generating exports, PDFs, and scheduled reports from central databases.

windows-application-development.whyChoose: Our .NET expertise delivers stable Windows applications that integrate with SQL Server, Active Directory, and existing enterprise infrastructure common in Indian organisations.
additionalContent: Windows desktop software remains the right choice when teams need deep keyboard workflows, local processing speed, or integration with hardware that browsers cannot access reliably. We design interfaces that match how power users work, reducing training time and daily friction.

WJB Technologies also helps extend desktop applications over time—adding modules, modernising UI layers, and connecting legacy tools to web or mobile channels through APIs without forcing immediate full replacement.

useCases.title: Workflow Automation
useCases.description: Custom approval chains, notifications, and task routing tailored to your policies.

useCases.title: Operations Platforms
useCases.description: Unified systems replacing email, spreadsheets, and manual handoffs across departments.

useCases.title: Industry-Specific Tools
useCases.description: Software shaped around domain logic that generic products cannot support.

useCases.title: Integration Hubs
useCases.description: Central platforms synchronising data between ERP, CRM, warehouse, and finance systems.

custom-software-development.whyChoose: Custom software from WJB Technologies is engineered around your processes—not the other way around—with transparent scoping, iterative delivery, and documentation your team can rely on.
additionalContent: Successful custom software starts with honest discovery. We map how work happens today, identify bottlenecks, and define measurable outcomes before writing code. This prevents building features nobody uses and keeps budgets aligned with business value.

Our delivery model supports phased releases so you gain usable functionality early while continuing to expand capabilities. Each phase includes testing, documentation, and handover steps that protect operational continuity.

whoItsFor: Businesses wanting mobile reach without dual native apps
Teams serving users on varied network conditions

useCases.title: Customer Self-Service
useCases.description: Installable PWAs for bookings, account access, and order tracking without app store dependency.

useCases.title: Retail Catalogues
useCases.description: Fast, offline-friendly product browsing for sales teams and showroom kiosks.

useCases.title: Internal Tools
useCases.description: Lightweight field apps for checklists, inspections, and data capture.

useCases.title: Content Platforms
useCases.description: Media-rich PWAs with caching for reliable playback and reading experiences.

progressive-web-apps.whyChoose: We implement PWAs with performance budgets, service worker strategies, and install prompts tuned for Indian mobile users—delivering app-like experiences at lower development and maintenance cost.
additionalContent: PWAs bridge the gap between website reach and app-like engagement. WJB Technologies evaluates whether a PWA fits your hardware, offline, and notification requirements before recommending architecture—honest guidance saves unnecessary native development cost.
We optimise PWAs for Core Web Vitals and real-device testing, ensuring acceptable performance on mid-range phones and slower networks prevalent across India.

whoItsFor: Startups launching on iOS and Android simultaneously
Teams maintaining one codebase for two platforms

useCases.title: Dual-Platform Launch
useCases.description: Simultaneous iOS and Android release from a shared React Native or Flutter codebase.

useCases.title: Enterprise Mobility
useCases.description: Internal apps for approvals, inventory checks, and team coordination across devices.

useCases.title: Customer Engagement
useCases.description: Brand apps with notifications, profiles, and transactional flows on both platforms.

useCases.title: Pilot Programmes
useCases.description: Rapid MVP builds to validate product-market fit before native optimisation.

cross-platform-development.whyChoose: Our cross-platform teams balance shared logic with platform-specific polish, reducing duplicate effort while keeping user experience credible on both iOS and Android.
additionalContent: Cross-platform development works best when platform differences are planned upfront—push permissions, deep links, biometric auth, and store compliance are handled deliberately rather than as afterthoughts.

WJB Technologies structures mobile codebases for long-term maintenance: clear module boundaries, documented native bridges where needed, and release processes your team or our support team can run confidently.

useCases.title: ERP Extensions
useCases.description: Custom modules extending ERP capabilities for workflows not covered by standard packages.

useCases.title: Approval Systems
useCases.description: Multi-level authorisation for procurement, HR, finance, and compliance processes.

useCases.title: Asset Management
useCases.description: Tracking equipment, maintenance schedules, depreciation, and utilisation across locations.

useCases.title: Compliance Platforms
useCases.description: Audit logging, document control, and role-based access for regulated operations.

enterprise-applications.whyChoose: Enterprise delivery demands discipline—WJB Technologies brings structured governance, security-conscious architecture, and phased rollouts that respect operational risk tolerance.
additionalContent: Enterprise projects require alignment across departments. We facilitate workshops, document decisions, and maintain traceability from requirements through testing so audits and handovers are straightforward.

Scalability, high availability, and disaster recovery are planned into architecture—not bolted on later. We work with your IT team on environment strategy, monitoring, and backup procedures suited to your infrastructure.

whoItsFor: Labs and studios with local processing needs

useCases.title: Design and Engineering Tools
useCases.description: Desktop utilities for calculations, file processing, and specialised visualisation.

useCases.title: Batch Processing
useCases.description: High-volume local data transformation, import/export, and scheduled jobs.

useCases.title: Kiosk Applications
useCases.description: Locked-down desktop apps for reception, factory floor, or public terminals.

useCases.title: Cross-OS Utilities
useCases.description: Electron or Qt apps delivering consistent experience on Windows, macOS, and Linux.

desktop-applications.whyChoose: We match desktop technology to your environment—.NET for Windows shops, Electron for cross-platform web-skilled teams—prioritising stability and IT deployability.
additionalContent: Desktop applications excel when users spend hours in the tool daily. We optimise for keyboard shortcuts, bulk actions, and responsive UI even during heavy background processing.
Synchronisation with cloud services is designed carefully—conflict resolution, retry logic, and clear offline indicators keep data trustworthy across disconnected and connected states.

whoItsFor: IT leaders facing rising maintenance costs
Businesses blocked from mobile and cloud adoption

useCases.title: UI Modernisation
useCases.description: Refresh outdated interfaces while preserving core business logic and data integrity.

useCases.title: Cloud Migration
useCases.description: Move on-premise applications to scalable cloud infrastructure with minimal downtime.

useCases.title: API Extraction
useCases.description: Expose legacy functionality through modern APIs for mobile and partner integrations.

useCases.title: Database Refactoring
useCases.description: Normalise schemas, improve performance, and enable reliable reporting.

software-modernization.whyChoose: We modernise pragmatically—assessing risk, delivering in phases, and maintaining business continuity rather than forcing risky big-bang replacements.
additionalContent: Modernisation success depends on understanding what the legacy system actually does—not just what old documentation claims. We invest in code archaeology, stakeholder interviews, and automated regression tests before structural changes.
Each modernisation phase delivers visible value—better UX, faster reports, or new integration capability—so stakeholders stay supportive throughout a multi-month programme.

whoItsFor: IT heads wanting predictable support SLAs

useCases.title: Bug Fix and Patches
useCases.description: Responsive resolution of production defects with root-cause analysis.

useCases.title: Dependency Updates
useCases.description: Framework, library, and OS compatibility updates to reduce security exposure.

useCases.title: Minor Enhancements
useCases.description: Small feature additions, report tweaks, and configuration changes within support scope.

useCases.title: Performance Tuning
useCases.description: Query optimisation, caching improvements, and bottleneck remediation.

maintenance-support.whyChoose: WJB Technologies treats support as partnership—proactive monitoring recommendations, transparent ticketing, and honest guidance on when enhancement projects are more appropriate than patches.
industries: All industries with live software assets
additionalContent: Reliable maintenance requires context. During onboarding we review architecture, deployment processes, and historical issues so responses are fast and accurate—not guesswork.
We balance stability with progress—applying security patches promptly while scheduling enhancements in controlled release windows that your operations team can plan around.

whoItsFor: Businesses with low adoption on existing apps

useCases.title: Product Discovery
useCases.description: User research, personas, and journey maps informing product direction.

useCases.title: Wireframe to UI
useCases.description: Low-fidelity flows through high-fidelity screens ready for development handoff.

useCases.title: Design Systems
useCases.description: Reusable components, tokens, and guidelines for consistent multi-screen products.

useCases.title: UX Audits
useCases.description: Heuristic reviews and usability recommendations for existing applications.

ui-ux-design.whyChoose: Our designers work alongside engineers from day one—delivering Figma specs, interaction notes, and accessible patterns that developers can implement without ambiguity.
additionalContent: Good design reduces support costs and increases conversion. We validate flows early with clickable prototypes, catching navigation problems before they become expensive code changes.
Indian users often interact primarily on mobile with varying literacy and connectivity. We design for clarity, thumb reach, and forgiving error states—not just aesthetic trends.

whoItsFor: Teams facing slow reports and queries
Projects requiring migration from legacy DBs

useCases.title: Schema Design
useCases.description: Normalised or strategically denormalised models supporting transactions and reporting.

useCases.title: Migration Projects
useCases.description: Safe data transfer from Access, Excel, or legacy servers with validation.

useCases.title: Performance Optimisation
useCases.description: Index tuning, query rewriting, and partitioning for large datasets.

useCases.title: Reporting Layer
useCases.description: Views, stored procedures, and ETL supporting BI and dashboards.

database-development.whyChoose: Database work at WJB Technologies is planned alongside application architecture—avoiding the painful retrofit of poorly designed schemas after features are built.
additionalContent: Data integrity is non-negotiable. We use constraints, transactions, and migration checkpoints to ensure business-critical records remain accurate through schema changes and platform moves.
Whether PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server, or MongoDB, selection is driven by data shape, query patterns, and team skills—not preference alone.

whoItsFor: Products needing mobile or partner connectivity

useCases.title: REST API Design
useCases.description: Versioned, documented APIs with consistent auth and error conventions.

useCases.title: Third-Party Integration
useCases.description: Connections to payment, SMS, CRM, ERP, and logistics providers.

useCases.title: Webhook Systems
useCases.description: Event-driven notifications between your platform and external systems.

useCases.title: Legacy Bridging
useCases.description: Middleware translating old systems into modern API consumers can use.

api-development.whyChoose: We build APIs that developers enjoy consuming—clear documentation, predictable behaviour, and security appropriate to data sensitivity.
additionalContent: APIs are contracts. Breaking changes damage trust with mobile apps, partners, and internal teams. We version deliberately and communicate deprecation timelines clearly.
Observability matters—structured logs, error tracking, and latency monitoring help you catch integration issues before customers report them.

useCases.title: Regression Testing
useCases.description: Structured test cycles before each release to catch unintended side effects.

useCases.title: Automation Suites
useCases.description: Repeatable API and UI tests integrated into CI pipelines.

useCases.title: Performance Testing
useCases.description: Load and stress tests revealing bottlenecks before peak traffic.

useCases.title: UAT Support
useCases.description: Test case preparation and facilitation for business sign-off.

software-testing.whyChoose: Our QA practice is collaborative—not adversarial—with developers. Defects are documented clearly with reproduction steps and severity that product owners can act on.
additionalContent: Testing early saves money. We involve QA during requirement review and sprint planning so edge cases surface before code is finalised.
Automation is applied where it returns value—stable regression paths and APIs—not everywhere for appearance. Manual exploratory testing still covers complex user scenarios automation misses.

whoItsFor: Organisations standardising on AWS or Azure

useCases.title: Cloud-Native SaaS
useCases.description: Multi-tenant architectures with subscription billing and tenant isolation.

useCases.title: Lift-and-Optimise
useCases.description: Migrating existing apps to cloud with right-sized infrastructure.

useCases.title: Serverless Workloads
useCases.description: Event-driven processing for sporadic or bursty compute needs.

useCases.title: DevOps Pipelines
useCases.description: CI/CD, infrastructure as code, and environment automation.

cloud-applications.whyChoose: WJB Technologies designs cloud solutions with cost visibility, security baselines, and runbooks your operations team can manage—not black boxes requiring permanent vendor dependency.
additionalContent: Cloud is a means to reliability and scale—not an end in itself. We right-size resources, use autoscaling thoughtfully, and review bills periodically to prevent runaway infrastructure cost.
Security in cloud environments requires identity management, network segmentation, and secrets handling from the first deployment—not retrofitted after an incident.

useCases.title: D2C Online Stores
useCases.description: Customer-facing shops with payments, shipping, and promotions.

useCases.title: B2B Ordering

useCases.title: Marketplace Features
useCases.description: Multi-vendor catalogues with commission and fulfilment splits.

useCases.title: Omnichannel Sync
useCases.description: Inventory and order synchronisation between online and offline channels.

ecommerce-development.whyChoose: We build e-commerce for Indian checkout realities—Razorpay and UPI flows, GST-aware invoicing, and mobile-first browsing on mid-range devices.
additionalContent: Checkout friction kills revenue. We streamline steps, surface trust signals, and test payment flows thoroughly before campaigns go live.
Post-launch, we help you iterate—search improvements, abandoned cart flows, and catalogue tools that marketing teams can operate without developers.

useCases.title: Marketing Websites
useCases.description: Editable pages, blogs, landing pages, and media libraries for marketing teams.

useCases.title: Multi-Language Ready

cms-development.whyChoose: We empower content teams with intuitive editorial workflows while keeping frontend performance and developer flexibility intact.
additionalContent: A CMS should simplify publishing—not create security risks. We configure roles, approval workflows, and plugin hygiene to keep sites maintainable and protected.
Headless approaches suit organisations publishing across channels. We help you choose between traditional and headless CMS based on team skills and channel strategy.

whoItsFor: Teams evaluating build vs buy decisions

useCases.title: Technology Assessment
useCases.description: Independent review of stack, architecture, and technical debt.

useCases.title: Roadmap Planning
useCases.description: Phased plans aligning software investment with business priorities.

useCases.title: Vendor Selection
useCases.description: Structured evaluation of platforms, agencies, and outsourcing options.

useCases.title: Agile Coaching
useCases.description: Process improvements for delivery teams and stakeholder communication.

software-consulting.whyChoose: Our consultants have delivery backgrounds—we give actionable recommendations grounded in what actually works in Indian business contexts, not generic slide decks.
additionalContent: Consulting engagements are most valuable when they end with clear decisions—what to build, what to buy, what to retire, and in what order. We document trade-offs openly so leadership can commit with confidence.
We remain vendor-neutral in recommendations. If an off-the-shelf product genuinely fits better than custom development, we will say so—and help you implement or integrate it effectively.
